entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop being studied for genetic diversity and resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A serious disease causing significant yield losses in maize

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of maize to resist downy mildew

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: A set of 102 maize lines from various countries used for analysis

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to measure genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the maize inbred lines

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to measure the informativeness of the SSR markers

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Alternative forms of a gene analyzed at various loci

entities.name: CHROMOSOMAL REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas of chromosomes associated with disease resistance

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci linked to resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: TEMPERATE MAIZE
entities.description: Maize lines originating from temperate regions

entities.description: Maize lines originating from subtropical and tropical regions
